# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-log-level: "warn"

---
# Service Account for API Gateway
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for User Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Order Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Payment Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# Service Account for Notification Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices

---
# API Gateway Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: "enabled"
        config.linkerd.io/opaque-ports: "3306,6379"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-request: "100m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-request: "64Mi"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-cpu-limit: "500m"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-memory-limit: "256Mi"
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi

---
# User Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: "enabled"
      labels:
        app: user-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi

---
# Order Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: "enabled"
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi

---
# Payment Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: "enabled"
      labels:
        app: payment-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi

---
# Notification Service Deployment
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-await: "enabled"
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: notification-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
              name: http
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8084
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 64Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi

---
# Kubernetes Services
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: notification-service
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
  type: ClusterIP

---
# ============================================================
# Server Policies - Define how each server accepts connections
# These enforce mTLS by requiring TLS on all server ports
# ============================================================

# Server policy for API Gateway - requires mTLS on port 8080
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for API Gateway HTTPS port
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-https
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8443
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for User Service - requires mTLS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for Order Service - requires mTLS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for Payment Service - requires mTLS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# Server policy for Notification Service - requires mTLS
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-http
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: TLS

---
# ============================================================
# Network Authentication - Define identity-based authentication
# MeshTLS authenticates peers using Linkerd mTLS identity
# ============================================================

# Require mesh TLS identity for all authenticated traffic
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: user-service
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: order-service
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payment-service
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: notification-service

---
# Specific mTLS authentication for API Gateway identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: api-gateway

---
# Specific mTLS authentication for Order Service identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: order-service

---
# Specific mTLS authentication for Payment Service identity
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: payment-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: payment-service

---
# ============================================================
# Authorization Policies - Fine-grained access control
# Only allow specific service-to-service communication paths
# ============================================================

# API Gateway -> User Service: Allow API Gateway to call User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# API Gateway -> Order Service: Allow API Gateway to call Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Order Service -> Payment Service: Allow Order Service to call Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Order Service -> Notification Service: Allow Order Service to call Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-to-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Payment Service -> Notification Service: Allow Payment Service to call Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: notification-service-http
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: payment-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# HTTP Route Policies - Path-level authorization
# Restrict which HTTP routes each service can access
# ============================================================

# Define HTTP routes for User Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: user-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: user-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/users
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET

---
# Define HTTP routes for Order Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: order-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: order-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/orders
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/orders
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET

---
# Define HTTP routes for Payment Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: payment-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: payment-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/payments
          method: GET
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET

---
# Define HTTP routes for Notification Service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: notification-service-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: notification-service-http
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /api/v1/notifications
          method: POST
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: Exact
            value: /healthz
          method: GET

---
# Route-level authorization: Only API Gateway can access user routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-user-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: user-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Route-level authorization: Only API Gateway can access order routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-order-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: order-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# Route-level authorization: Only Order Service can access payment routes
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-order-payment-routes
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: HTTPRoute
    name: payment-service-routes
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io

---
# ============================================================
# Network Policies - Additional Kubernetes-level network security
# Defense in depth: restrict traffic at the network layer too
# ============================================================

# Default deny all ingress traffic in the namespace
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress

---
# Allow Linkerd control plane communication
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-linkerd-control-plane
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"

---
# Allow DNS resolution
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-dns
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53

---
# API Gateway network policy - receives external traffic, talks to user/order services
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - port: 8080
        - port: 8443
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: user-service
      ports:
        - port: 8081
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
      ports:
        - port: 8082

---
# User Service network policy - only accepts from API Gateway
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
      ports:
        - port: 8081

---
# Order Service network policy - accepts from API Gateway, talks to payment and notification
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: api-gateway
      ports:
        - port: 8082
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service
      ports:
        - port: 8083
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: notification-service
      ports:
        - port: 8084

---
# Payment Service network policy - accepts from Order Service, talks to notification
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
      ports:
        - port: 8083
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: notification-service
      ports:
        - port: 8084

---
# Notification Service network policy - accepts from order and payment services only
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: notification-service-network-policy
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: order-service
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: payment-service
      ports:
        - port: 8084

---
# ============================================================
# Retry and Timeout Policies via ServiceProfile
# ============================================================

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: user-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/users
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/users
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 10s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: GET /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: POST /api/v1/orders
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/orders
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 15s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: payment-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments
      isRetryable: false
      timeout: 30s
    - name: GET /api/v1/payments
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /api/v1/payments(/.*)?
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 5s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.1
    minRetriesPerSecond: 5
    ttl: 10s

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  routes:
    - name: POST /api/v1/notifications
      condition:
        method: POST
        pathRegex: /api/v1/notifications
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 10s
    - name: GET /healthz
      condition:
        method: GET
        pathRegex: /healthz
      isRetryable: true
      timeout: 2s
  retryBudget:
    retryRatio: 0.2
    minRetriesPerSecond: 10
    ttl: 10s
